title: Bootstrap default Space and channel on daemon init
description: On nie-daemon first run (or migration), create one Space record and one channel Chat record in the local JMAP data store. Space name configurable (default: 'nie'). Channel name configurable (default: 'general'). IDs are stable ULIDs assigned at creation and persisted — not regenerated on restart. All users are @everyone members; no custom roles needed for the default space.
